steps.title: Identify what the blank introduces
steps.content: The blank precedes a list of specific inventions (an automobile turn signal, a safety brake, and the first automatic gearshift). These items are examples that elaborate on and specify the noun “inventions” mentioned just before.

steps.title: Apply the rule for introducing elaborating lists
steps.content:
When you introduce a list of examples that elaborate on a noun, use a comma followed by a present participle like “including.” Choice C is correct.

The other choices are finite verbs that violate this structure by creating awkward constructions or conflicting with the past tense “patented.” This matches choice C — C is correct.
